name: Arcane Recovery
description: Once per day when you finish a short rest, you can recover expended spell slots of a combined level determined by your Wizard level.

name: Arcane Tradition
description: Choose an Arcane Tradition, which grants additional features as you gain Wizard levels.

name: Cantrip Formulas
description: After a long rest, you can replace one Wizard cantrip you know with another cantrip from the Wizard spell list.

name: Spell Mastery
description: Choose a 1st-level and a 2nd-level Wizard spell that you can cast at will without expending spell slots, subject to the feature's rules.

name: Signature Spells
description: Choose two 3rd-level Wizard spells as your signature spells, allowing you to cast each once without expending a spell slot before requiring a long rest.
